name: Mare Mare
desc: Cannot be Special Summoned, except by the effect of a Wyrm monster. During your Main Phase: You can reduce this card's Level by 1, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Mini Mare Mare Token" (Wyrm/WATER/Level 1/ATK 300/DEF 200). You can only use this effect of "Mare Mare" up to thrice per turn.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Special Summoned, except by the effect of a Wyrm monster. During your Main Phase: You can reduce this card's Level by 1, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Mini Mare Mare Token" (Wyrm/WATER/Level 1/ATK 300/DEF 200). You can only use this effect of "Mare Mare" up to thrice per turn.

sets.set: Egyptian God Deck: Obelisk the Tormentor

summoning: Cannot be Special Summoned except by a specific method
